notes: Maps retired/aliased provider model names to their current canonical SKU. Consulted by CloudProvider.getSelectedModel (when a user's UserDefaults entry is stale) AND by ChatView.resolveAnthropicModel (when the catalog cross-ref fails to resolve a name to a directApiName). When a provider retires a model, add the row here - mchatai-source PR + refreshMchataisourceCache ships it without a binary rebuild. Phase ROUTE+4 (2026-06-01). The ChatView mapping (the newer of the two pre-consolidation Swift tables) is the authoritative source for entries that disagreed. Move 3 (2026-06-11) added forward/identity rows for claude-opus-4-8 + claude-fable-5 and dot-form + -latest pointers; explicit 4.6/4.7 selections are deliberately NOT remapped to 4.8 (preserve user choice).
